Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi 401 Bus Timetable - Souq to Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque

September 13, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system offers an affordable and efficient way to navigate the city and its suburbs. This article provides a detailed overview of Bus 401, including key stops, timings, and essential information for passengers, allowing travelers to conveniently access major attractions and enjoy a seamless journey.

Operational Details

Bus 401 operates consistently throughout the day, offering frequent service to accommodate all passengers.

From Souq From Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque
05:21 05:30
05:51 06:00
06:26 06:30
06:56 07:00
07:26 07:30
07:56 08:00
08:26 08:30
08:56 09:00
09:26 09:30
10:26 10:30
11:26 11:30
12:26 12:30
13:26 13:30
14:26 14:30
15:26 15:30
15:56 16:00
16:26 16:30
16:56 17:00
17:26 17:30
17:56 18:00
18:26 18:30
18:56 19:00
19:26 19:30
20:26 20:30
21:26 21:30
22:26 22:30

Bus 401 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for the 401 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Fares for Bus 401 are collected via the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The standard fare for traveling within one zone is AED 2, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can conveniently top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks across the city for a hassle-free experience.

Route Overview

  1. Souq The starting point, featuring shops and local products.

  2. Taxi Station An essential stop for those needing alternative transportation.

  3. Baniyas Cooperative Society A hub for grocery shopping.

  4. Imam Ahmed Bin Hambal Mosque A local place of worship.

  5. Al Tafawwuq Street A major roadway connecting various areas.

  6. Al Zoud Street Enhancing access to different neighborhoods.

  7. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall South and North A popular shopping destination.

  8. Street 13 A well-trafficked road in the area.

  9. Abu Dhabi University A prominent educational institution.

  10. Al Maqta Bus Interchange · A A transfer point for multiple routes.

11.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Accessibility and Services

Bus 401 is designed to accommodate passengers with special needs, ensuring a comfortable journey for everyone. The buses feature:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for passengers with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-visual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments.

This inclusive design makes Bus 401 a great option for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Along the route, passengers can access several notable attractions: 1.

  1. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall A vibrant shopping center offering a wide variety of retail and dining experiences.

  2. Abu Dhabi University A leading institution that contributes to the city’s educational landscape.

Journey Experience

Taking the Bus 401 from Souq to the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque offers a pleasant journey through Abu Dhabi’s dynamic cityscape. Departing from the lively Souq, passengers pass notable landmarks like the Imam Ahmed Bin Hambal Mosque and Bawabat Al Sharq Mall, a favorite for shopping and dining.

The route also showcases local life, with stops near Abu Dhabi University and residential areas, blending modernity with cultural heritage.

Travel Tips for Bus 401

  • Check Timings: Verify the bus schedule to minimize waiting times.

  • Utilize the Hafilat Card: This card enables quick, cashless payments for a smoother experience.
  • Stay Informed: Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates on bus schedules and routes.
  • Travel Off-Peak: If possible, avoid peak hours to enjoy a more relaxed ride.

Ride Bus 401 to discover the cultural treasures of Abu Dhabi! Be sure to check out all the bus routes available in Abu Dhabi for even more travel options!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 13, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
